---
title: "CV"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.text-center}
<a href="https://canva.link/c0pjpd0ovyjus9h" target="_blank">
  <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2">📄 CV en Español</button>
</a>
<a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ariibard/cv/main/cv-en.pdf" target="_blank">
  <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary">📄 CV in English</button>
</a>
:::
